title: System operation process
subTitle: Workflow from Lead to Customer
overview: DMS operates along the flow: Inventory → Lead → Deal → Customer. Below are the main steps and rules.
step1Desc: Add vehicles with Draft status; when ready to list, set to Available. When a deposit is taken set to Reserved; when the deal is closed set to Sold.
step2Desc: Leads are created from forms, hotline or manual entry. Update status: New → Contacted → Test drive → Negotiation. Outcome: Closed (won) or Lost.
step3Desc: When a lead is ready to buy, create a Deal and link a vehicle if applicable. Move stages: Lead → Test drive → Negotiation → Loan processing. Outcome: Won or Lost.
step4Desc: After a deal is won, customer info is stored under Customers. You can view deal history and continue after-sales care.
step5Desc: The Overview page shows metrics: total vehicles, leads by status, deals by stage, conversion rate, revenue and top sales staff.
notesMock: Current version uses mock data (localStorage). Seed data loads on first run; CRUD is saved in the browser. Supabase will be integrated later for multi-device sync.
